releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Add Claude Code GitHub Workflow by @mfarr in https://github.com/mfarr/obsidian-archive/pull/25
* Address issues surfaced by Obsidian plugin review by @mfarr in https://github.com/mfarr/obsidian-archive/pull/27


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mfarr/obsidian-archive/compare/0.6.1...0.6.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Add claude GitHub actions 1774542556683 by @mfarr in https://github.com/mfarr/obsidian-archive/pull/22
* Add auto-archive feature as module by @albertsj1 in https://github.com/mfarr/obsidian-archive/pull/21
* Version 0.6.0 by @mfarr in https://github.com/mfarr/obsidian-archive/pull/23

## New Contributors
* @albertsj1 made their first contribution in https://github.com/mfarr/obsidian-archive/pull/21

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mfarr/obsidian-archive/compare/0.5.2...0.6.1
